title: 曼聯有部份球員 嬴波晉級後不能大事慶祝 ...

replies.msg:
MANCHESTER UNITED youngster Mason Greenwood will be on the bench against Paris Saint-Germain tonight - and back in school by Friday.

And The Times has revealed he is expected back at Ashton on Mersey School, with whom the club have a partnership, later this week.

James Garner, 17, Brandon Williams, 18, Angel Gomes, 18, and 19-year-old Tahith Chong are also included.

quote.msg: 呢啲球員讀既都應該係足球學校啦，有咩所謂

replies.msg:
文法學校黎，要考gcse，有囡囡
不過同曼聯有合作關係，曼聯會送佢啲青訓去讀，比啲青訓做唔到職業球員都可以銜接大學讀sports science, science management果啲野
間學校1200人,其中幾十個學生係曼聯青年軍
學校校友包括普巴，連格特，梳高斯，韋迫克，伊雲斯，比基
